name: phoneme_phon_balanced
description: Balanced version of phoneme_phon_demo. Drops `shore` so the shared phoneme /ɹ/ appears in exactly 1 noun (river) and 1 verb (run), removing the noun-bias that polluted the held-out riverrun probe in the demo run.

probe_words.expected_composition: /ɹ/ balanced (1N:1V), /ɪ v/ noun-trained, /ʌ/ verb-trained, /n/ verb-trained (2 supervisions)
probe_words.prediction: N/V ratio should be near 1, possibly slightly verb-leaning because /n/ was supervised twice (run + sends).
